nodes.label: AI as search tool for simple queries
nodes.grounding_span: I use it for personal queries which I would have normally tasked a search engine with

nodes.label: AI as editing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to create email bodies which I then edit and also to mass edit documents

nodes.label: AI as editing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I asked AI to replace 'they' with the names of each student from a list and to correct the grammar

nodes.label: AI for translation of legal documents
nodes.grounding_span: I have also used AI for translations of legal documents

nodes.label: Authenticity of AI-generated content
nodes.grounding_span: I make sure to do my own edits as well so as to add my personal touch to it

nodes.label: Confidentiality in AI use
nodes.label_negative: Avoiding AI for confidential information due to security concerns
nodes.grounding_span: I also normally do not use AI when it comes to confidential information as I am not yet sure how secure it is

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I often use AI to solve difficult contest-level math problems... I correct it and then prompt the model to redo that section

nodes.label: AI as tool for lesson planning
nodes.label_negative: AI as mere task automation tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI can be a very good teacher rather than just something that does things for you

nodes.label: AI for mechanical task automation (LaTeX conversion)
nodes.label_negative: Sticking to simple tasks without AI
nodes.grounding_span: I want to use it for more complex tasks... I am hoping to be able to create LaTeX documents using AI

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: saving myself a lot of time

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: add my personal touch to it

nodes.label: Privacy and data security
nodes.grounding_span: I am not yet sure how secure it is

nodes.label: Skill development and learning
nodes.grounding_span: I can then get inspiration to create my own problems

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: If I spot any mistakes in its reasoning, I correct it

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: once I switched models and come up with a rewording of the prompt, I was able to make the correct edits to the document and thus saving myself a lot of time

nodes.label: Frustration with AI making unintended changes
nodes.grounding_span: The first time using AI to create the report card comments was frustrating because it was hard to get the model to make mass edits

nodes.label: Concern about privacy with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I also normally do not use AI when it comes to confidential information as I am not yet sure how secure it is

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I want to use it for more complex tasks

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I begin with the prompt stating the problem and then, using the given answer, I prompt the model again to reverse engineer its solution

nodes.label: Learning-oriented review and adaptation
nodes.grounding_span: I always carefully review what AI creates for me; so that I can fix it if needed, or to learn from it
